metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore the entrepreneurial mindset and develop practical skills for identifying opportunities, creating viable business plans, and launching ventures. This course emphasizes innovation, risk management, startup strategy, and understanding venture capital and funding mechanisms.
metadata.general_description: Business plan development, startup strategy, innovation, and venture capital for aspiring entrepreneurs.

big_ideas.statement: Entrepreneurship transforms ideas into value by identifying opportunities and mobilizing resources to meet market needs
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful entrepreneurs recognize problems, envision solutions, and execute strategies that create value for customers and stakeholders.

big_ideas.statement: Innovation and creativity drive entrepreneurial success through differentiation and competitive advantage
big_ideas.elaboration: Entrepreneurs must identify unique approaches, develop distinctive value propositions, and continuously adapt to changing market conditions.

big_ideas.statement: Comprehensive business planning translates entrepreneurial vision into actionable strategies and measurable goals
big_ideas.elaboration: Business plans serve as roadmaps for execution and communicate value to investors, partners, and team members.

big_ideas.statement: Risk management and financial sustainability determine whether startups survive and scale into successful enterprises
big_ideas.elaboration: Entrepreneurs must balance growth ambitions with prudent management of cash flow, debt, and stakeholder expectations.

competencies.raw: Design business concepts that identify and address market opportunities
i_can_statements: I can identify and validate business opportunities and market needs
I can develop unique value propositions that differentiate ventures
I can design business models that generate sustainable revenue
I can evaluate feasibility and scalability of business ideas

competencies.raw: Design comprehensive business plans that guide venture development
i_can_statements: I can develop detailed business plans with all essential components
I can create financial projections and break-even analyses
I can design go-to-market strategies and launch plans
I can develop operational plans and organizational structures

competencies.raw: Design strategies to secure funding and manage investor relationships
i_can_statements: I can identify appropriate funding sources for different venture stages
I can develop pitch decks and investor presentations
I can calculate valuation and equity structures
I can design strategies for investor communication and reporting

competencies.raw: Design risk management and contingency strategies
i_can_statements: I can identify business risks and mitigation strategies
I can develop contingency plans for critical scenarios
I can assess financial risks and cash flow management
I can design sustainability and growth strategies

competencies.raw: Apply market research and analysis techniques to validate business opportunities
i_can_statements: I can conduct primary and secondary market research
I can analyze competitive landscapes and positioning
I can segment markets and identify target customers
I can assess market size and growth potential

competencies.raw: Apply financial management and accounting skills to startup operations
i_can_statements: I can develop financial projections and cash flow statements
I can prepare pitch materials for investors
I can manage startup finances and accounting
I can calculate key performance indicators and metrics

competencies.raw: Apply communication and networking skills to build entrepreneurial ventures
i_can_statements: I can pitch business ideas persuasively to audiences
I can communicate with investors, partners, and customers
I can build relationships and networks within entrepreneurial ecosystems
I can present business concepts and progress effectively

competencies.raw: Apply project management and execution skills to launch ventures
i_can_statements: I can develop detailed project plans and timelines
I can manage resources and budgets effectively
I can track progress and adjust strategies as needed
I can execute launches and scale operations

competencies.raw: Use business planning and project management software
i_can_statements: I can use tools to develop and organize business plans
I can use project management platforms to track progress
I can leverage templates and frameworks for startup development
I can create interactive business plan documents

competencies.raw: Use financial modeling and analysis tools
i_can_statements: I can build financial models using spreadsheet applications
I can create visual financial projections and dashboards
I can use accounting software for startup bookkeeping
I can analyze financial scenarios and outcomes

competencies.raw: Use digital marketing and customer engagement technologies
i_can_statements: I can use digital marketing platforms to reach customers
I can leverage social media for brand building and promotion
I can use customer relationship management systems
I can measure marketing effectiveness through analytics

competencies.raw: Use presentation and collaboration technologies effectively
i_can_statements: I can create compelling pitch decks and presentations
I can use video and multimedia for investor pitching
I can collaborate with team members using digital tools
I can communicate progress and results to stakeholders

areas.name: Opportunity Recognition and Business Ideation
topics: Problem identification and customer needs analysis
Market opportunity validation and feasibility analysis

areas.name: Business Planning and Development
topics: Comprehensive business plan components and structure

areas.name: Funding and Investor Relations
topics: Funding sources and mechanisms (equity, debt, grants)
Venture capital and angel investor landscape
Pitch deck development and presentation skills
Investor due diligence and reporting requirements
